label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 12

extraction.one_line_summary: MOLANO Juan Sebastian won via UAE's middle-right positioning against traffic flow, while GROVES dropped chain and ROGLIC gained 4 bonus seconds at intermediate sprint closing GC gap.
tactical_patterns: UAE went middle-right against conventional left-side positioning on leftward curving finish, finding space Groves' train missed.
ROGLIC deliberately contested intermediate sprint bonus seconds on flat stage, closing 4 seconds on EVENEPOEL while GC teams idle.
Jayco burned domestiques early for GROVES at intermediate sprint, potentially compromising lead-out depth for finale positioning.

rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: negative: Mechanical (dropped chain) at critical moment despite being marked wheel, but points lead now insurmountable at 200-point margin.
rider_signals.MOLANO Juan Sebastian: positive: UAE's sprint option beat GROVES head-to-head with OLIVEIRA delivering exceptional high-speed lead-out through technical finale.
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Opportunistically hunted 4-second intermediate bonus on non-GC stage, actively closing gap rather than passive time-saving approach.
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Boy: neutral: Third place despite being designated domestique for HOULE who got trapped, revealing UAE's spatial awareness advantage.
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Rui: positive: Delivered leadout at exceptional speed through unconventional right-middle positioning, key tactical architect of UAE sprint win.
